Interface Map<K,V>

An object that maps keys to values.

Method Summary

Modifier and TypeMethodDescription
Vput(K key, V value)Associates the specified value with the specified key.

Method Details

put

V put(K key, V value)
Parameters:
key - key with which the value is associated
value - value to be associated
Returns:
the previous value
Throws:
ClassCastException - if the key is incompatible
